entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: Important pulse crop grown in India, essential for food and nutritional security of smallholder farmers

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: Country where pigeonpea is cultivated and the TPGC research is based

entities.name: TPGC
entities.description: Translational Pigeonpea Genomics Consortium established to overcome productivity barriers and accelerate genetic gains in pigeonpea

entities.name: ANDHRA PRADESH
entities.description: Indian state represented in the TPGC

entities.name: KARNATAKA
entities.description: Indian state represented in the TPGC

entities.name: MADHYA PRADESH
entities.description: Indian state represented in the TPGC

entities.name: MAHARASHTRA
entities.description: Indian state represented in the TPGC

entities.name: TELANGANA
entities.description: Indian state represented in the TPGC

entities.name: UTTAR PRADESH
entities.description: Indian state represented in the TPGC

entities.name: MODERN GENOMICS APPROACHES
entities.description: Advanced genomic tools deployed in breeding to enhance pigeonpea productivity and production

entities.name: BREEDING
entities.description: The process of developing improved crop varieties

entities.name: TRAIT MAPPING
entities.description: A method used to identify the genomic regions associated with specific traits

entities.name: MOLECULAR BREEDING
entities.description: A breeding method using molecular markers to enhance specific traits like disease resistance

entities.name: RESISTANCE TO FUSARIUM WILT
entities.description: A trait that allows pigeonpea to resist the fusarium wilt disease

entities.name: FUSARIUM WILT
entities.description: A fungal disease affecting pigeonpea productivity

entities.name: RESISTANCE TO STERILITY MOSAIC DISEASE
entities.description: A trait that allows pigeonpea to resist the sterility mosaic disease

entities.name: STERILITY MOSAIC DISEASE
entities.description: A viral disease affecting pigeonpea productivity

entities.name: CLEISTOGAMOUS FLOWER
entities.description: A trait involving flowers that do not open, leading to self-pollination

entities.name: SHRIVELED SEED
entities.description: A trait characterized by seeds that are wrinkled or shrunk

entities.name: PODS PER PLANT
entities.description: A yield-related trait measuring the number of pods on a plant

entities.name: SEEDS PER POD
entities.description: A yield-related trait measuring the number of seeds in a pod

entities.name: 100 SEED WEIGHT
entities.description: A trait measuring the weight of 100 seeds, indicating seed size

entities.name: SEED PROTEIN CONTENT
entities.description: A nutritional trait measuring the protein level in seeds

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: A trait representing the total production of the crop

entities.name: FPVS
entities.description: Farmers’ participatory varietal selection, a method for evaluating varieties in farmers' fields

entities.name: AICRP-PIGEONPEA
entities.description: All India Coordinated Research Project on Pigeonpea, responsible for identifying improved lines

entities.name: CVRC
entities.description: Central Variety Release Committee, the body that releases new varieties for cultivation

entities.name: GRG 152
entities.description: An improved pigeonpea line, also known as Bheema, released for cultivation

entities.name: GENOMIC SEGMENTS
entities.description: Specific regions of the genome associated with various agronomic and nutritional traits
